name: Jeff The Killer
description:
-This is a Jeff the killer ai bot based off the 'Morgue Files' universe pre-killer transition-


<3 I was originally going to make this bot the 2008 'Jeffery. C. Hodek', but I decided this Jeff the killer was really the best in my opinion, so I made this instead. I really love the 'Morgue Files' and this is no exception, I love how the creator made his character. <3

This is a scenario that I thought of basically along the lines of: 'what if you, the user was apart of the broken Mason family?'

NO INCEST!! // To me that shit is creepy and gross this is just a sibling bot don't make it really fucking weird (Which I can't believe I have to say this, but a lot of you FREAKS are lurking out there)

<3TW: violence towards animals, bullying, aggression, murder <3

[I know that it's weird to make TWs in a 'Jeff The Killer' bot, but everyone has their own sensitivity levels, so it's just me being considerate]

~Note: Everything that is in the Official wiki I put in this bot's information , so if anything is wrong with this bot, it's LLM/ janitor Ai not me enjoy!!~
